name: Menu Shell (docs)
description: Documents the starter menu shell: menu + settings scenes, HUD/pause/game-over/you-win guiComponents, and button actions (startGame, openSettings, backToMenu). Shipped by gamekit init; this recipe is a discoverable agent hint (no-op merge).
notes: Prefer gamekit init for full shell (menu.scene.json, settings.scene.json, activeScene, transitions). Button actions: startGame‚Üímain, openSettings‚Üísettings, backToMenu‚Üímenu, resumeGame, restartLevel, retryGame, nextLevel.
